center.name: 重点鸟区
center.summary: 重点鸟区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Black-breasted buttonquail、Meratus white-eye、Meratus blue flycatcher等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | last5=Murray | title=Distribution of Black-breasted Button-quail Turnix melanogaster in the Great Sandy Region, Queensland and associations with vegetation communities | journal= Emu – Austral Ornithology | doi=10.1080/01584197.2022.2047733 | date= March 2022| volume= 122 | issue= 1 | pages= 71–76| bibcode= 2022EmuAO.122...71W | s2cid= 247534104 }} It is found in Palmgrove National Park, which has been identified by BirdLife International as an Important Bird Area for the species. The black-breasted buttonquail was once populous on Inskip Point, with the area a destination for birdwatchers wanting to see this species

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Meratus Mountains it inhabits are designated as an Important Bird Area by BirdLife International. Recommended conservation measures for the species include surveys to accurately estimate its population, finding the demand for the species in the songbird trade, and finding suitable tracts of habitat to protect

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Meratus Mountains it inhabits are designated as an Important Bird Area by BirdLife International. Recommended conservation measures for the species include surveys to accurately estimate its population, finding the demand for the species in the songbird trade, and finding suitable tracts of habitat to protect

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Centre Hills and South Soufriere Hills Important Bird Areas on the island of Montserrat in the Lesser Antilles of the West Indies, and is the national bird of this British territory
